CheckTitle: 已为 S3 存储桶策略变更配置 CloudWatch 日志度量过滤器和告警
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/Industry and Regulatory Standards/CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark
Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices/Runtime Behavior Analysis
Description: **CloudTrail** 日志会被评估是否存在一个匹配 S3 存储桶配置变更（ACL、策略、CORS、生命周期、复制；例如 `PutBucketPolicy`、`DeleteBucketPolicy`）的 **CloudWatch 度量过滤器**，以及相应的 **CloudWatch 告警**。
Risk: 如果没有对 S3 策略和 ACL 变更进行告警，未授权的修改可能长期不被发现，从而削弱数据的**机密性**和**完整性**。滥用这些变更可能导致存储桶被公开暴露，授予写入/删除权限或更改复制路径，从而实现数据外泄和破坏性操作。

Code.NativeIaC:
```yaml
# CloudFormation：针对 S3 存储桶策略变更的 CloudWatch 度量过滤器和告警
Resources:
  <example_resource_name>MetricFilter:
    Type: AWS::Logs::MetricFilter
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: <example_resource_name>  # 关键：需要监控的 CloudTrail 日志组
      FilterPattern: '{($.eventSource=s3.amazonaws.com) && (($.eventName=PutBucketAcl) || ($.eventName=PutBucketPolicy) || ($.eventName=PutBucketCors) || ($.eventName=PutBucketLifecycle) || ($.eventName=PutBucketReplication) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketPolicy) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketCors) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketLifecycle) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketReplication))}'  # 关键：检测 S3 存储桶策略相关变更
      MetricTransformations:
        - MetricName: <example_resource_name>
          MetricNamespace: <example_resource_name>
          MetricValue: "1"

  <example_resource_name>Alarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: <example_resource_name>
      Namespace: <example_resource_name>   # 关键：必须与度量过滤器一致
      MetricName: <example_resource_name>  # 关键：必须与度量过滤器一致
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Period: 300
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: 1
```
Code.Other:
1. 打开 CloudWatch 控制台，进入 Logs > Log groups。
2. 选择接收 CloudTrail 事件的日志组。
3. 创建度量过滤器：
   - 选择“Create metric filter”（创建度量过滤器）。
   - 在 Filter pattern 中填写：
     ```
     {($.eventSource=s3.amazonaws.com) && (($.eventName=PutBucketAcl) || ($.eventName=PutBucketPolicy) || ($.eventName=PutBucketCors) || ($.eventName=PutBucketLifecycle) || ($.eventName=PutBucketReplication) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketPolicy) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketCors) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketLifecycle) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketReplication))}
     ```
   - 设置 Metric name 和 Namespace（任意合适的值），Metric value = 1，然后保存。
4. 在 Metric filters 选项卡中选择新建的过滤器并点击“Create alarm”（创建告警）。
5. 设置：Statistic = Sum，Period = 5 minutes，Threshold type = Static，Condition = Greater/Equal，Threshold = 1，Evaluation periods = 1，然后创建告警。
Code.Terraform:
```hcl
# 用于 S3 存储桶策略变更的 CloudWatch 度量过滤器
resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_metric_filter" "<example_resource_name>" {
  name           = "<example_resource_name>"
  log_group_name = "<example_resource_name>"
  # 关键：从 CloudTrail 日志中检测 S3 存储桶策略变更
  pattern = "{($.eventSource=s3.amazonaws.com) && (($.eventName=PutBucketAcl) || ($.eventName=PutBucketPolicy) || ($.eventName=PutBucketCors) || ($.eventName=PutBucketLifecycle) || ($.eventName=PutBucketReplication) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketPolicy) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketCors) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketLifecycle) || ($.eventName=DeleteBucketReplication))}"

  metric_transformation {
    name      = "<example_resource_name>"
    namespace = "<example_resource_name>"
    value     = "1"
  }
}

# 针对上述度量的告警
resource "aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm" "<example_resource_name>" {
  alarm_name          = "<example_resource_name>"
  metric_name         = "<example_resource_name>"  # 关键：与度量过滤器一致
  namespace           = "<example_resource_name>"  # 关键：与度量过滤器一致
  comparison_operator = "GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold"
  evaluation_periods  = 1
  period              = 300
  statistic           = "Sum"
  threshold           = 1
}
```

Recommendation.Text: 为 S3 存储桶的策略、ACL、CORS、生命周期和复制配置并维护 **度量过滤器** 与 **告警**。将告警路由到受监控的渠道并与 SIEM 集成。对访问权限实施**最小权限原则**，强制变更审查，并通过**深度防御**快速发现和阻断不安全的存储桶策略变更。
